自卑仔 咪再9拎數據出黎啦 唔識引用數據 走咪走出黎7啦 僱主較願意請 唔一定代表間u係好過無咁願意請
貪你平咋 on9仔

照你個source, Poly>>HKU?

Your statements are lacking of nutrients

In order to confidently claim University A is better than University B,

we shall be able to observe that: for the same subjects, the majority of A's admission scores are higher than those of B's.

This is what we can observe from comparing 3Big to non-3Big, so we can claim confidently that "3Big is better than non-3Big"

However according to the admission score list I've shown above, we can observe that: neither CUHK nor HKU has the majority of its subjects achieving higher admission scores than its rival.

Thus, we cannot conclude neither CUHK > HKU nor HKU > CUHK, only CUHK ~ HKU

Your statements are lacking of nutrients

In order to confidently claim University A is better than University B,

we shall be able to observe that: for the same subjects, the majority of A's admission scores are higher than those of B's.

This is what we can observe from comparing 3Big to non-3Big, so we can claim confidently that "3Big is better than non-3Big"

However according to the admission score list I've shown above, we can observe that: neither CUHK nor HKU has the majority of its subjects achieving higher admission scores than its rival.

Thus, we cannot conclude neither CUHK > HKU nor HKU > CUHK, only CUHK ~ HKU
